## AUDIT FINDINGS

### What is what
| Category | Contents |
|----------|----------|
| **Generator Engine** | `07_NexusLandingEngine/` — the tool that creates landing pages (Node.js + Claude API) |
| **Client Demo Pages** | `Website/WDD Malaysia/` — actual landing pages for real clients (AircondFresh, Aurelia Glow, dental) |
| **Archive Blueprints** | `Website/archive/` — early system design docs, superceded by current engine |
| **Old Session Memory** | `C--Users-Selina-Desktop-Claude-ai-landing-page-system-v2/memory/` — stale memory from a Desktop-based dev session |

### Key observations
1. **AircondFresh** has 3 HTML versions (`lama.html`, `aircond-fresh-services.html`, `index.html`) — `index.html` (105.7KB, 2026-05-13) is the latest/production version
2. **Aurelia Glow** skincare has 2 versions — `index.html` (2026-05-07) is latest
3. **Generator UI** (`public/index.html`) is 62.8KB — a complete, modern single-file app
4. **No duplicates** of the generator engine — only 1 copy in `07_NexusLandingEngine/`
5. **Archive blueprints** (`Website/archive/`) are design artifacts from before the engine was built, not active code
6. **Stale memory** in Desktop project folder (`C--Users-Selina-Desktop...`) says "build complete, 1 step remaining (.env API key)" — this is the same Railway deployment blocker we know about
